prompt: Replace the ‘o’ in ‘Eco’ with the leaf, matching baseline and x-height.

Ensure the leaf's bottom edge aligns with the baseline, and its main body height matches the x-height of the surrounding lowercase characters, seamlessly integrating into the 'ecoleaf' logotype.
